LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARK HOOSHMAND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT AND JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS DO NOT CLEARLY AND NECESSARILY SHOW THAT PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS ARE TIME-BARRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: RHYS BOYD-FARRELL, ESQ., FARLEY LAW FIRM, 559.738.5975, FOR PLAINTIFFS CONNIE AND KENDRA TOMCIK.
MARK RODRIGUEZ, ESQ., SPECTER & WILLOUGHBY LLP, 949.833.9400, FOR DEFENDANT MARK HOOSHMAND.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MARK HOOSHMAND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The face of the complaint and judiciallynoticeable documents do not clearly and necessarily show that plaintiffs' claims are time-barred. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
